text:
fr-aster-9.0.0.2_1 requires metis-edf-4.0.3_1
	CalculiX-1.5_2 requires metis-4.0_2
	/usr/ports/math/metis and /usr/ports/math/metis-edf install files into the same place

(...)
===>  Installing for metis-4.0_2

===>  metis-4.0_2 conflicts with installed package(s): 
      metis-edf-4.0.3_1

      They install files into the same place.
      Please remove them first with pkg_delete(1).
      *** Error code 1

      Stop in /usr/ports/math/metis.
      *** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: 	try to install metis and metis-edf
